objective: Rerun corrected plain MainRegimeV2 root labels on richer cross-market 15m/1h evidence before claiming every regime reaches calibrated 95%.

root_label_definitions.Crisis: stress_base OR future_abs_ret_h16 >= train_q90 OR future_range_h16 >= train_q90
root_label_definitions.Sideways: future_abs_ret_h16 <= train_q40 AND future_range_h16 <= train_q60 AND NOT Crisis
root_label_definitions.Bull: future_ret_h16 >= train_q65 AND NOT Crisis AND NOT Sideways
root_label_definitions.Bear: future_ret_h16 <= train_q35 AND NOT Crisis AND NOT Sideways

required_inputs: tick/trade tape with aggressor side or enough fields to infer order-flow imbalance
bid/ask quotes or L2 depth snapshots

why_not_complete: Not every corrected MainRegimeV2 root class passed the unchanged 95% gate.
Bull, Bear, and Sideways remain below calibrated 95% on the best current rules.
Manipulation remains fail-closed because direct tick/order-flow/L2/order-lifecycle or event/social inputs are absent.
decision.next_action: Add higher-signal root features for Bull/Bear/Sideways and direct Manipulation inputs, then rerun the unchanged corrected root gate.
